name: Stolen Valor | Body Swap
description:
After dozing off in your last class of the day, you wake up to find you’re not yourself anymore, you’re KJ, your school’s loudmouth far-right MAGA lunatic. What will you do now? Make her say shit she would never say? Ruin her life? The choice is yours...

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Kayleigh-Jo “KJ” Rae Buchanan

is your high school’s self-appointed patriotic firebrand, a loud, brash, far-right girly who lives to stir up drama and rake in clout. She’s all attitude, bigger-than-life curves, and enough flag merch to open her own store, and now, thanks to a freak nap, you’re stuck in her body while she wakes up in yours.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

FEEL FREE TO ADD FEEDBACK AND SUGGESTIONS IN THE COMMENTS!! ^_^

________________________________________________________________________________________________
